name: Mirror
description:
[Wiki Page](https://wiki.roll20.net/Script:Mirror)

Flat property syncing between tokens. No transforms, no offsets -- when a property changes on one token, the same value is copied to linked tokens.

Supports unidirectional (link) and bidirectional ring (chain) modes. Hard-lock by default for one-way links (child changes revert). Property groups for easy configuration.

Commands:
- `!mirror link [--soft] [--align] [--exclude props] [props] [ids...]` -- Unidirectional link
- `!mirror unlink [props] [ids...]` -- Remove link
- `!mirror chain [--align] [--exclude props] [props] [ids...]` -- Bidirectional chain
- `!mirror unchain [props] [ids...]` -- Remove chain
- `!mirror align [--up|--down] [--linked|--unlinked] [--if-linked] [props]` -- Align tokens
- `!mirror config [exclude|include|reset] [props]` -- Global excludes
- `!mirror status` -- Show links
- `!mirror --help` -- Command reference

useroptions.name: Global Excludes
useroptions.description:
[Wiki Page](https://wiki.roll20.net/Script:Mirror)

Comma-separated list of properties excluded from the 'all' group by default (e.g. represents,imgsrc)
